name: devin-clone
description: Devin-style AI Coding Agent - Single .exe Desktop App

scripts.install:all: npm run install:backend && npm run install:desktop
scripts.dev: start cmd /k "npm run dev:backend" && npm run dev:desktop
scripts.build:backend: cd backend && pyinstaller --onefile --name backend --distpath ../dist --workpath build --specpath . server.py
scripts.build:all: npm run build:backend && npm run build:desktop
scripts.sandbox:run: docker run -d --name devin-sandbox -p 6080:6080 -p 5900:5900 --cap-add SYS_ADMIN --security-opt seccomp=unconfined devin-sandbox:latest
